items.title: II Netherlands–Kazakhstan Business Meeting
items.description: A bilateral business meeting bringing together Dutch and Kazakhstani companies to explore trade opportunities and strengthen economic cooperation.

items.title: Benelux Trade Talks (Conference) UZB
items.description: A dedicated conference for Benelux and Uzbekistani businesses to engage in focused trade dialogue, explore partnerships, and expand bilateral commercial ties.

items.title: BeNeLux Spring Networking Reception
items.description: An exclusive networking reception for members of the Benelux Chamber of Commerce in Uzbekistan to connect with peers, diplomats, and business partners.

items.title: Uzbekistan Government & Business Mission Visit to The Netherlands (World Horti Centre)
items.description: A high-level government and business delegation visit to the Netherlands, focusing on the horticulture sector and exploring investment opportunities at the World Horti Centre.

items.title: 59th Annual Meeting of the Asian Development Bank
items.description: The annual gathering of the Asian Development Bank, bringing together finance ministers, central bank governors, and development leaders from across Asia and the Pacific.

items.title: 28th International Oil & Gas Exhibition and Conference – OGU 2026
items.description: One of Central Asia's leading oil and gas exhibitions, showcasing the latest technologies and connecting industry players from across the region and beyond.

items.title: 19th International Exhibition on Energy, Energy Saving, Nuclear Energy, Alternative Energy Sources — Power Uzbekistan 2026
items.description: A comprehensive international exhibition covering energy efficiency, nuclear energy, and alternative energy sources, highlighting Uzbekistan's energy transformation agenda.

items.title: Uzbekistan Energy Week — UEW 2026
items.description: A flagship energy forum bringing together government officials, international experts, and industry leaders to discuss Uzbekistan's energy policy and investment landscape.

items.title: 26th International Exhibition of Textile and Garment Industry — TextileExpo Uzbekistan Spring 2026
items.description: An international exhibition showcasing the latest innovations in textile and garment manufacturing, bringing together industry leaders from across Central Asia and Europe.

items.title: EIT Raw Material Summit 2026
items.description: A high-level summit focused on raw material sustainability, supply chain resilience, and innovation across European and global markets.

items.title: Dutch King's Day Reception (Koningsdag)
items.description: The annual reception hosted by the Dutch Embassy and Benelux Chamber in Uzbekistan to celebrate King's Day and strengthen bilateral ties.

items.title: Breakfast Briefing in Tashkent (NL/BE/LU)
items.description: An intimate business briefing for the Netherlands, Belgium, and Luxembourg community in Tashkent — covering market updates, trade opportunities, and Chamber activities.

items.title: The Eighth Global Environment Facility Assembly and Associated Meetings
items.description: A major international assembly gathering global leaders and representatives to address environmental sustainability, climate action, and biodiversity challenges.

items.title: GITEX Central Asia & Caucasus 2026
items.description: A leading technology and innovation exhibition connecting Central Asia and the Caucasus with global tech leaders, startups, and investors.
